---
title: "Validation Suites"
subtitle: "Tests, evidence expectations, and drift procedures"
doc-type: section-landing
audience: "Assessors · adapter owners · ATO packagers"
canon-source: "src/uiao/canon/"
derived-from: "uiao canon"
---

# Validation Suites {.unnumbered}

Validation material for every adapter and modernization domain. Each suite
defines:

- **Test cases** — what must pass for the capability to be considered conformant.
- **Evidence expectations** — the artifacts the suite emits into the evidence fabric.
- **Drift procedures** — how divergence from canon is detected and reported.

Suites are organized by scope. Adapter suites map 1:1 to entries in
[Adapter Specs](../adapter-specs/index.html); modernization suites map 1:1
to entries in [Modernization Specs](../modernization-specs/index.html).

## Adapter validation suites

| Slug | Adapter | Paired spec |
|---|---|---|
| `adapters/cyberark` | CyberArk PAM | [spec](../adapter-specs/index.html) |
| `adapters/entra-id` | Microsoft Entra ID | [spec](../adapter-specs/index.html) |
| `adapters/infoblox` | Infoblox DDI | [spec](../adapter-specs/index.html) |
| `adapters/intune` | Microsoft Intune | [spec](../adapter-specs/index.html) |
| `adapters/m365` | Microsoft 365 | [spec](../adapter-specs/index.html) |
| `adapters/mainframe` | Mainframe integration | [spec](../adapter-specs/index.html) |
| `adapters/palo-alto` | Palo Alto Networks | [spec](../adapter-specs/index.html) |
| `adapters/patch-state` | Patch state collector | [spec](../adapter-specs/index.html) |
| `adapters/pki-ca` | PKI certificate authority | [spec](../adapter-specs/index.html) |
| `adapters/scuba` | CISA SCuBA | [spec](../adapter-specs/index.html) |
| `adapters/scubagear` | SCuBAGear assessment | [spec](../adapter-specs/index.html) |
| `adapters/service-now` | ServiceNow ITSM | [spec](../adapter-specs/index.html) |
| `adapters/siem` | SIEM ingest | [spec](../adapter-specs/index.html) |
| `adapters/stig-compliance` | DISA STIG compliance | [spec](../adapter-specs/index.html) |
| `adapters/terraform` | Terraform state | [spec](../adapter-specs/index.html) |
| `adapters/vuln-scan` | Vulnerability scan ingest | [spec](../adapter-specs/index.html) |

## Modernization validation suites

| Slug | Domain | Paired spec |
|---|---|---|
| `domains/identity` | Identity modernization | [spec](../modernization-specs/index.html) |
| `domains/cloud` | Cloud substrate and boundary | [spec](../modernization-specs/index.html) |
| `domains/zero-trust` | Zero-trust implementation | [spec](../modernization-specs/index.html) |
| `domains/sase` | Secure access service edge | [spec](../modernization-specs/index.html) |
| `domains/sdwan` | Software-defined WAN | [spec](../modernization-specs/index.html) |
| `domains/telemetry` | Telemetry and evidence | [spec](../modernization-specs/index.html) |
